pr.title: Seq2048 + FP16 Tied Embedding + Tuned LR (val_bpb 1.2067)

output.summary: Extends baseline with seq2048, FP16 tied embeddings, int6+zstd enabling 1344 MLP, tuned Muon momentum/opt params, sliding-window evaluation.
techniques: 2048-context training with fp16 tied embedding passthrough
Full int6 quantization + zstd-22 compression to fit wider MLP
Sliding-window evaluation with higher Muon momentum and tuned learning rates
